title: trifolium xanthinoides
intro: Trifolium xanthinoides, also known as yellow clover or common hop clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Trifolium xanthinoides can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
